expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]是总的尺寸，[板厚]是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[背板厚度]是背板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Ketinggian], [Kedalaman] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [KetebalanPapanBelakang] adalah ketebalan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi], [Kedalaman] adalah pengukuran total, [KetebalanPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [KetebalanPapanBelakang] adalah ketebalan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [กว้าง], [สูง], [ลึก] คือขนาดรวม, [ความหนาแผ่น] คือความหนาวัสดุแผ่นบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [ความหนาแผ่นหลัง] คือความหนาวัสดุแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Chiều rộng], [Chiều cao], [Chiều sâu] là kích thước tổng thể, [Độ dày bảng] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Cạnh, [Độ dày bảng sau] là độ dày vật liệu bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa isang kabinet. [Lapad], [Taas], [Lalim] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [Kapal ng Tabla] ay kapal ng materyales ng tabla sa Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid, [Kapal ng Tabla sa Likod] ay kapal ng likurang tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပစ္စည်းတွေကိုကောက်ချမှတ်ချက်တွေဖြင့်စုစည်းကာ အကြမ်းဖျင်းမူတိုင်းပြုလုပ်ခြင်းအကြောင်းများकोတင်း အားသာချွန်ကာတုံးနဲ့ ပြန့် (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ការគណនាទំហំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [ប្រវែង], [កម្ពស់], [ជម្រៅ] គឺជាវាស់ស្ទង់សរុប, [កម្រាស់បន្ទះ] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈលើ ក្រោម & ផ្ទៃខាង, [កម្រាស់ផ្ទាំងខាងក្រោយ] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈផ្ទាំងខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄັ້ງສຸດ, dem wood taxiux (AI translated, please check).
